metadata.title: DLG Tech — Architect-Founded Engineering Team
metadata.description: Your next CTO doesn't need equity. Architect-founded engineering team with real technical oversight and startup-friendly rates.

hero.subtitle: Most IT agencies put a salesman between you and the code. We're an architect-founded 100% engineering team — real technical oversight, enforced standards, and rates that won't kill your runway.
hero.proof: 14+ years architecting products for startups across the US and Europe.

founder.name: Eugene Dolgov
founder.bio: I've spent 14+ years building products for startups across the US and Europe. I've worked inside platforms like Crossover — I know exactly what you get, and what you overpay for.
founder.point1text: Most agencies are run by business people who find cheap developers and mark them up. I'm an architect who builds real teams with real standards.
founder.point2title: You pay for engineering, not overhead
founder.point2text: No project managers pretending to be tech leads. No juniors presented as seniors. Every developer on your project is vetted and trained by me personally.
founder.point3text: I design the system right from day one — so you don't burn money rewriting code six months later. Then my team executes under my ongoing technical oversight.

team.title: Engineers, not outsourcers.
team.subtitle: Every developer on your project is hand-picked, trained, and technically supervised. No random freelancers. No juniors in disguise.

process.title: Flexible by design.
process.subtitle: Every startup is different. We adapt to what you actually need — not force you into a one-size-fits-all model.
process.model1Desc: You describe what you need. We architect, build, and deliver — end to end. You stay focused on your business while we handle the engineering.
process.model1Point1: Complete project ownership from architecture to deployment
process.model1Point3: Fixed scope or time-and-materials — your choice
process.model1Fit: Best for: Founders without a tech team
process.model2Desc: Your own engineering team, managed and technically supervised by us. Sprint-based workflow with full transparency into what's being built.
process.model2Point1: Dedicated developers working exclusively on your product
process.model2Point2: Sprint planning, daily standups, weekly demos
process.model2Point3: Scale up or down as your needs change
process.model2Fit: Best for: Startups with ongoing development
process.model3Desc: Our engineers join your existing team seamlessly. Same tools, same workflow, same standups — just more hands on deck.
process.model3Point1: Engineers integrate into your processes and tools
process.model3Point2: Work alongside your team as if they were hired directly
process.model3Point3: Billing through us — no HR or legal overhead for you
process.model3Fit: Best for: Companies that need to scale fast

testimonials.title: Trusted by founders who've been burned before.
testimonials.t1Quote: We went through two agencies before finding DLG Tech. Night and day difference. Eugene actually understands architecture — our codebase is clean, scalable, and the team ships fast.
testimonials.t2Quote: What sold me was the transparency. No hidden juniors, no surprise invoices. I know exactly who's working on my product and the code quality is consistently high.
testimonials.t3Quote: They integrated into our existing team so smoothly that our investors thought we'd hired full-time. The architecture-first approach saved us months of technical debt.

faq.title: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.subtitle: Everything founders typically ask before working with us.
faq.faq1Q: What timezone do you work in?
faq.faq1A: Our team works with significant overlap with US business hours (EST/PST). We're available for standups, Slack, and real-time collaboration during your workday. Async communication is handled within hours, not days.
faq.faq2Q: How do you ensure code quality?
faq.faq2A: Every pull request goes through code review. The architecture is designed upfront by a senior architect, and we enforce coding standards, automated testing, and CI/CD pipelines from day one. No shortcuts.
faq.faq3Q: What if I'm not happy with a developer?
faq.faq3A: We'll replace them — no questions asked. Our commitment is to the quality of work delivered, not to any individual. That said, because we vet and train our engineers personally, this rarely happens.
faq.faq4A: We offer both hourly and fixed-price models depending on the project. Rates are 2-3x less than equivalent US talent. No hidden fees, no surprise invoices. You get a clear breakdown before we start.
faq.faq5Q: Can I talk directly to the developers?
faq.faq5A: Absolutely. There's no communication layer between you and the team. You'll have direct access via Slack, daily standups, or whatever tools you prefer. We believe in zero-overhead communication.
faq.faq6A: Typically within 1-2 weeks of our initial call. We scope the project, align on architecture, and assign the right engineers. For team extensions, we can move even faster if we have available engineers.

finalCta.title: Ready to build something great?
finalCta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute call. No pitch decks, no sales pressure — just a conversation between engineers about what you're building.
finalCta.note: Free consultation · No commitment · Response within 24 hours

footer.tagline: Architect-founded engineering team. Real technical oversight, startup-friendly rates.
